since_last: 70% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.94%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.55% · Gold +1.58% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 70% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.94%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.94%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +6.79%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +6.79%, MRVL +6.17%, MU +5.96%, LRCX +5.78%, AMAT +5.47%. Laggards: ADBE -3.80%, WDAY -3.55%, INTU -3.39%, CRM -3.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.54% at $121.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
